name:
Warm dusty pink soil ground in pixel art top-down view, soft mauve-pink earth surface with gentle organic grain, faint dust particles scattered, painterly desaturated palette dominated by rose-pink RGB(180,138,140) and dusty mauve, no harsh outlines, dreamy magical biome floor, fully walkable flat ground, no elevation, no wall, Alabaster Dawn aesthetic, soft pastel mood → Pale cream-beige sandy patch in pixel art top-down view, lighter sand-toned ground RGB(220,200,170) with subtle dust grain, occasional small pebbles and tiny pale flecks, painterly desaturated palette with warm cream and tan tones, NO blue NO cool grey, walkable flat ground at exact same elevation as the surrounding pink soil — NO height difference, NO wall, NO raised edge, just gentle texture and color shift, dreamy magical biome variation</upper_description>
<parameter name="transition_description">Soft organic blend where pale cream sand patches dust onto warm pink soil, irregular fade with scattered tiny pebbles at the boundary, no height edge, no shadow rim, just gentle texture and color fade between dry dusty pink ground and lighter cream sand, walkable continuous surface, Alabaster Dawn style soft pastel transition
lower_description: Warm dusty pink soil ground in pixel art top-down view, soft mauve-pink earth surface with gentle organic grain, faint dust particles scattered, painterly desaturated palette dominated by rose-pink RGB(180,138,140) and dusty mauve, no harsh outlines, dreamy magical biome floor, fully walkable flat ground, no elevation, no wall, Alabaster Dawn aesthetic, soft pastel mood
upper_description:
Pale cream-beige sandy patch in pixel art top-down view, lighter sand-toned ground RGB(220,200,170) with subtle dust grain, occasional small pebbles and tiny pale flecks, painterly desaturated palette with warm cream and tan tones, NO blue NO cool grey, walkable flat ground at exact same elevation as the surrounding pink soil — NO height difference, NO wall, NO raised edge, just gentle texture and color shift, dreamy magical biome variation</upper_description>
<parameter name="transition_description">Soft organic blend where pale cream sand patches dust onto warm pink soil, irregular fade with scattered tiny pebbles at the boundary, no height edge, no shadow rim, just gentle texture and color fade between dry dusty pink ground and lighter cream sand, walkable continuous surface, Alabaster Dawn style soft pastel transition

pattern_system.description: 4×4 patterns with wildcards for flexible tile matching

pattern_layout.description: 4×4 grid where center 2×2 matches tile corners, outer ring uses wildcards

example.row_1: Wildcard + NW corner + NE corner + Wildcard
example.row_2: Wildcard + SW corner + SE corner + Wildcard

usage.description: Sample 4×4 terrain around tile position, encode as pattern key, lookup in cache
